ratingDrivers.description: The body's unknowns and open questions have not been revisited since the service-contract area was added.
The changelog records the codebase and security expansion and a sensor maturation entry before the evaluation run.

localAnalysis.rationale: The changelog explains model growth, but the body self-check still depends on inferential review.
